reasoning:
FIDE publishes updated rankings on the first of every month, which are promptly updated on the Wikipedia page. For the November list, Lagno is ranked 9th with a rating of 2517.
1. By 2025-11-16, the active list will undeniably still be the November one. Her rank will remain 9, meaning it resolves to exactly her 2025-11-09 ranking. Thus it is practically certain to be "as high or higher".
2. By 2025-12-09, the December 1st updates will have taken place. Lagno is positioned tightly amongst peers, notably Anna Muzychuk at 2518 (just 1 point ahead at rank 8) and Bibisara Assaubayeva at 2513 (4 points behind at rank 10). Without robust live rating data on late October/November matches, she is highly susceptible to small rating shifts bumping her to rank 8 or dropping her to rank 10. Given she only needs to maintain >= 9th place and could naturally swap with Muzychuk, a 55% estimate is reasonable.
3. By 2026-02-07, three rank updates will have happened. Uncertainty is higher and variance will regress toward a 50/50 toss up, so giving a 51% estimation aligns closely with a neutral expectation.
